Moles on Face (tr)
It has been stated in Birth Chart 16 of Aries a'scen-
dant that the wife of the native will have a mole on her
face. Rahu, the shadowy dark planet, is representative of
such black growths on the skin and should have influ-
ence on the pa.rt of the body concerned. The face of wife
is the 8th house whose lord is located with Rahu. Sun,
the lord of the sign, occupied by Rahu, aspects the 8th
